notes: Phase 1 / Tier 14 list (Mogu'shan Vaults, Heart of Fear, Terrace of Endless Spring — Heroic versions). Tier token bosses: helm = Sha of Fear, shoulders = Lei Shi, chest = Grand Empress Shek'zeer, hands = Wind Lord Mel'jarak, legs = Amber-Shaper Un'sok. Dual-wield build — two Claws of Shek'zeer; the two-handed alternative (same armor) runs Gao-Rei, Staff of the Legendary Protector from Tsulong. Four-piece Red Crane. Draft compiled from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Brewmaster Monk gear guide (Phase 1 dual-wield table).
